title: phlegmariurus crassus var. manus-diaboli
intro: Phlegmariurus crassus var. manus-diaboli, also known as Devil's Hand, is a species of plant in the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus crassus var. manus-diaboli include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
